layouts.summary: Full-width hero followed by layered proof and supporting sections.
Alternating wide media and text rails with strong vertical rhythm.
Hero, highlights, specs, proof, and CTA in a linear product narrative.
Dense work surface with fixed controls, structured panels, and scan-first tables.

Narrative sequence with strong landmarks, maps, or guided discovery blocks.

Stable navigation rail with form-heavy content split by configuration sections.
